should_trigger: Design checkpoint and rollback recovery for a long-running agent orchestrator where workers can crash after reading queue messages and before committing step status.
Our orchestrator promises exactly-once completion but retries tool calls after restore. Review the checkpoint boundaries, replay positions, and side-effect commit protocol.
Choose checkpoint interval, timeout, minimum pause, and durable storage for a stateful workflow engine that must resume after deploys and storage hiccups.
A run graph has bounded branches that finish early while other branches continue. Design the final checkpoint and commit behavior so finished branches do not lose buffered output.
We need retained restore points for cancellation recovery, migrations, and manual rollback of orchestrated jobs. Decide when to use automatic checkpoints versus savepoint-like snapshots.
should_not_trigger: Summarize Apache Flink checkpointing documentation for a study group.
Design a stateless HTTP endpoint that can be restarted without preserving any in-flight work.
Create a dashboard for checkpoint metrics and alert thresholds after the recovery design is already finalized.
edge_cases: A workflow has only one local worker today but makes non-idempotent external API calls and may retry after process restart. Trigger this skill if durable recovery or rollback behavior is being designed.

A streaming job is timing out checkpoints under backpressure. Trigger this skill for recovery semantics and checkpoint policy; use performance or observability skills for low-level tuning and dashboards.

compliance_expectations.should_trigger: Define recovery objective, checkpointed state, replay source, durable storage, checkpoint boundary/cadence, side-effect protection, restore and retention behavior, and recovery tests with invariants.
compliance_expectations.should_not_trigger: Do not trigger for generic documentation summaries, stateless restartable endpoints, or dashboard work after the recovery contract is settled.
compliance_expectations.edge_cases: Trigger when durable recovery, rollback, checkpoint policy, or non-idempotent side-effect recovery is being designed; otherwise defer to performance or observability guidance.
compliance_expectations.runtime_dependency: The response must use SKILL.md as the complete runtime knowledge source and must not ask to read external files, webpages, original books, source reports, external source folders, or source-pack material.
